name: fidelity-insights-crawler
description: 爬取 Fidelity International 网站的研究洞察内容

scripts.crawl:equities: ts-node -e "const {FidelityInsightsCrawler} = require('./fidelity-insights-crawler'); const c = new FidelityInsightsCrawler(); c.crawlPage({url: 'https://professionals.fidelity.co.uk/solutions/equities', name: 'equities', insightSection: 'Our latest equities insights', waitForTexts: ['Our latest equities insights', 'Equities']}).then(console.log)"
